input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.2.5
            TITLE: all harness hardware must be installed and threaded in accordance with manufacturer’s

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.2.5: All Harness hardware must be installed and threaded in accordance with manufacturer’s
T.2.2.5 All Harness hardware must be installed and threaded in accordance with manufacturer’s 
instructions

final_answer: All Harness hardware must be installed and threaded in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions
